text:
Created attachment 239190
Patch for utf8cpp

Compile tested on FreeBSD 13.1-STABLE (amd64) (make, make check-plist)
Poudriere testport OK 12.3-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.1-RELEASE (i386)

devel/libantlr4

games/vvvvvv
